title: Build Metadata Schema
description: Schema for recording metadata of builds (build parameters)

printerBuildID.title: Printer Build ID
printerBuildID.description: Automatically generated identifier for the printer build

buildParameters.title: Build Process Parameters
buildParameters.description: Laser process parameters for all regions of the build. Each type (upskin, downskin, infill, contouring) can appear only once.
